rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for implementation-level signal routing must be placed in the implementation scope after relevant subcomponents and connections
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Output dependency guarantees should relate visible inputs to visible outputs, avoiding implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in appropriate AADL scopes: type scopes for component contracts, implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
